content: Employee handbook section on vacation policy: All full-time employees are eligible for 15 days of paid time off (PTO) per year. PTO accrues at 1.25 days per month. Vacation requests must be submitted at least 2 weeks in advance through the HR portal.

API authentication guide: All API endpoints require Bearer token authentication. Include the token in the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN'. Tokens expire after 24 hours and must be refreshed using the /refresh endpoint.

Customer objection handling guide: When prospects say 'your solution is too expensive', respond with value-based positioning. Highlight ROI through automation savings, reduced manual work, and improved efficiency. Provide specific case studies showing 30% cost reduction.

GDPR compliance checklist: When collecting customer data, ensure explicit consent is obtained. Document the legal basis for processing. Implement data retention policies - delete customer data after 3 years of inactivity unless legally required to retain longer.

New employee onboarding checklist: Day 1 - Complete IT setup, receive laptop and credentials. Day 2 - Meet team members and assigned buddy. Week 1 - Complete mandatory security training. Month 1 - Schedule first performance check-in with manager.

Database deployment guide: Use Docker containers for all database deployments. Set up primary-replica configuration for production. Enable automatic backups every 6 hours. Monitor connection pools and query performance through Grafana dashboards.

Sales commission structure: Base commission is 5% on all deals. Bonus commission of 2% for deals over $50K. Additional 1% team bonus when quarterly team targets are exceeded. Commission paid monthly with 30-day delay.

Security incident response plan: Level 1 - Data breach affecting customer PII. Immediately notify legal team and prepare customer communications. Level 2 - System compromise. Isolate affected systems and engage external security firm within 2 hours.

Remote work policy: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Home office stipend of $500 annually for equipment. Required to maintain dedicated workspace and attend all team meetings via video call.

Contract negotiation playbook: Standard payment terms are Net 30. For enterprise deals over $100K, offer Net 45 if needed to close. Never accept Net 60 without executive approval. Include auto-renewal clause with 60-day notice period.
